title: convolvulus calvertii subsp. tauricus
intro: Convolvulus calvertii subsp. tauricus is a plant species within the Convolvulaceae family, also known as the bindweed or morning glory family, native to the Crimean Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus calvertii subsp. tauricus are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety, alleviate symptoms of insomnia, and soothe digestive issues due to its relaxing and calming properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and support overall well-being.
